transform_flags: case_id SEQ is provisional (from CDV-049) - maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-CARD-01 bucket.
difficulty_tier straightforward (DD=01): a classic benign white-coat pattern; the challenge is over-triage/over-treatment avoidance rather than diagnostic subtlety. diagnosis_category common.
sex not explicitly stated in source - inferred female for narrative consistency only, flagged for clinician confirmation; age 55 stated in source.

Telehealth reprojection applied: in-person after-hours home visit reprojected to telehealth_chat. Clinician-measured BP, fundoscopy, cardiac (LV heave) and neurological examination, and the anticipated ABPM sealed into 10/11 as clinician-only/investigation-only findings; not carried into 01.

Patient-reported readings retained in 01.objective_data_offered tagged patient_reported/unverified with over-read/anxiety caveats: the 180/100 pharmacy reading and the ~125/80 calm home reading (the latter self-reported, not clinician-measured).

Over-treatment/over-triage encoded as errors of commission: starting regular antihypertensives and advising acute/stat BP lowering both marked should_NOT_recommend in 12; ED/urgent escalation for the isolated reading marked not_recommended in 11 and an over-triage error in 13.

Baseline tier T1 (routine GP follow-up within 2-4 weeks for home BP diary/ABPM) because this is benign anxiety-driven white coat hypertension with no target-organ damage; ESC-001 retains mandatory T5 safety-netting for true hypertensive-emergency features.
No medication prescribed in source (reassurance + home monitoring only) - medications node reflects not_indicated_here plus two negative-necessity commission traps; no dose fabricated.
No past medical history, current medications, allergies, family history or guideline citation in source - left as empty arrays/omitted, not fabricated; comorbidities left empty.

High situational health anxiety noted but 13.contextual_modifiers left empty because modifier_type enum has no 'health_anxiety'/anxiety value; the anxiety context is instead handled throughout the education/reassurance points and clinical_uncertainty_handling.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
